name: Délai de Récupération
description: Calculez le délai de récupération d'un investissement.
seo_title: Délai de Récupération – Étape par Étape
seo_description: Calculez le délai de récupération d'un investissement. Calculateur gratuit, précis et instantané. Calculatrice facile a utiliser avec decomposition de la.
example_label: Calculating payback period for $75,investment generating $18,annual cash flow.
result_context: The payback of {payback} years shows how long until the initial investment is recovered.
formula_display: Payback Period = Initial Investment ÷ Annual Cash Flow
steps: {'step': 2, 'description': 'Interpret the result', 'calculetion': 'Investment recovers in approximately years and weeks'}
mistakes: Not considering time value of money (use discounted payback instead)
Ignoring cash flows that occur after payback period
Using accounting profit instead of actuel cash flows
